message:
fix: close_agent returns structured status instead of bare 'closed' (GAP-7.02)

closeAgent now captures the subagent's status, output, and turns_used
before closing, and returns them as a JSON object. Previously it
returned the bare string "closed" which gave the parent agent no
information about how the subagent finished.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
